# lnkzip

> lnkzip is a free URL shortener and QR code generator with a public API. It creates short links with custom aliases, generates a QR code for every link, and tracks click analytics — with no sign-up required for basic use.

lnkzip lets developers and marketers shorten long URLs into branded, memorable short links and instantly get a downloadable QR code for each one. Every shortened URL includes click tracking (total clicks, device, referrer) and can be created via the web app or the free HTTP API. Sign-up is optional and unlocks link history and per-link analytics.

Key facts:

- Free to use, no sign-up required for basic link shortening and QR generation
- Public HTTP API available at no cost
- Custom short aliases (e.g. `lnkzip.com/my-campaign`)
- QR code generated automatically for every short link, downloadable as PNG
- Click tracking: total clicks, device type, referrer
- Optional free account for link history and per-link analytics dashboard
- Built with React, Vite, and Supabase (Postgres + Edge Functions)

- [API Documentation](/api): Free HTTP API for URL shortening and QR generation
- [About](/about): Who builds lnkzip and how it works
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the team
- [Blog](/blog): Guides on URL shortening, QR codes, and link analytics
